Generated by vscodesweeper. Records live on the state branch. Apply copies the suggested comment for you to paste on the issue and close it yourself — vscodesweeper never edits microsoft/vscode. Fix copies a CLI command that generates a fork-only draft PR (or links it once it exists) — fixes never target microsoft/vscode.
